temporal_oof.large_under_note: mean signed log-error on actual >=$60M (negative = under-predict). V30 adds a demand-QUALITY gate (net audience intent x demand) that separates true event films from look-alike high-demand flops, plus Track B: flag-confident films report an elevated quantile (max of HDR50 and Q55) so large openers are lifted toward the demand-implied level WITHOUT raising the flop over-prediction rate. Track C reports a P78 demand-implied upside. This is what fixed the historical large-film under-prediction flop-safely.

generations.note: CatBoost+Linear blend + HDR/BAYES + demand-forward >=50M flag + demand-QUALITY gate (net-intent x demand) + Track B point-lift for confident large films + Track C P78 upside. Holdout aLoss 0.573 vs v28b 0.766, flop-over held; lifts event films (Michael/PHM/Mandalorian) flop-safely
